title: ExN MP
description: A Modpack around Create with additions to Vanilla Minecraft.
body:
A modpack around the Create Mod with Additions to Vanilla Minecraft.

## TL;DR - Features to expect
- Create mod and additions
- More animals to make the world less "boring"
- A variety of food items
- A lot of performance improving mods
- QoL mods to make YOUR gameplay better

---

## Main Focus of this modpack
[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) is a mod which brings a whole new idea and gameplay to Minecraft with many Community Additions being made for it such as [Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition), [Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice), [Steam 'n' Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails) and many more yet to come and be included in this modpack.

With this mod and all its additions, others have made compatible versions for it such as [Rechiseled](https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled-create) and the above mentioned Crafts & Additions, which also makes Farmer's Delight compatible with Create.

To also bring a bit of joy and variety to the animal world of minecraft, [Naturalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist) has been chosen.


## Performance and optimization
This modpack might be small in size, but having a stutter free gameplay is what makes it count.
Mods like Sodium with its addon Indium, Lithium and others bundled together improve the general performance on a noteable basis.

## Quality of Life
Jade, Merchant Markers, Mouse Tweaks, various new Animations, Backpacks and more have been added, to also make the overall gameplay easier and add a bit of QoL stuff.


## Installation
Everything can also be present on a server expect [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons), please avoid using this mod on your server (Client-Side).


### Optionals

#### Shaders
[Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) is already pre-installed, so please pick a recommended shader from below or install your desired shared.
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
- [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)

It is **highly recommended** to install [Iris & Oculus Flywheel Compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iris-flywheel-compat/files?page=1&pageSize=20&version=1.20.1&gameVersionTypeId=4) from Curseforge, to avoid lags, stutter and high GPU usage, while looking at your Create contraptions. This is due to a deactivation of Flywheel optimization once using shaders.

#### Resource Packs
- Dark Mode UI
  - [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark)
  - [Reimagined GUI (Dark)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimaginedguidark)
  - [Mandala's GUI - Dark mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mandalas-gui-dark-mode)
  - [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode)

- Texture Packs
  - [Simply 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simply3d)
    - Personal favorite
  - [New Default+](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/newdefaultplus)
    - A very nice texture pack which allows high customization of items via Name Tags
    - This resource pack is hosted on Curseforge by SeaOfPixels

---
